message:
feat(conformance): Add harmonica conformance test suite with all 24 tests passing

- Create conformance tests for spring physics (12 tests)
  - Default step, at target, with velocity
  - Underdamped, overdamped, critically damped modes
  - High/low frequency, convergence, negative target
  - Zero frequency edge case, large displacement
- Create conformance tests for projectile motion (8 tests)
  - Freefall, horizontal, upward motion
  - 3D trajectories with multiple steps
  - Terminal gravity (inverted coordinates)
  - Zero gravity edge case
- Create conformance tests for FPS utility (4 tests)
  - 30, 60, 120, 144, 240 FPS conversions

Uses 1e-6 epsilon with combined absolute/relative comparison
to account for floating-point differences between Go and Rust
math library implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
